occupation_title: Molding, Coremaking, and Casting Machine Setters, Operators, and Tenders, Metal and Plastic
occupation_definition: Set up, operate, or tend metal or plastic molding, casting, or coremaking machines to mold or cast metal or thermoplastic parts or products.
